"[4] Responders may need to search an area extending at least 20 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user. The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 1057 meters. Responders may need to search 20 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user. Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA! The battery level of the user's device is 61-100%. Their phone number is +19735901224. The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency."

"[3] This request is for MULTIPLE PEOPLE. The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH. NO ONE is trapped. The person in need IS NOT injured. The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH. PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected. Two-way text with the user is now available."
